messages.content:
My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I got my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU. I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. My research interest lies in Generative Models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image generation and video generation with diffusion models. My long-term goal is to become a researcher who develops principled and deployable methods that address real-world constraints such as \textbf{data scarcity, distribution shift, efficiency, safety, or interpretability}. Through rigorous training and cross-institution collaboration in a Joint PhD setting, I aim to advance both the theoretical understanding and practical impact of \textbf{(your topic)}.
  
帮我改改读博动机，具体的，改成：我的长期目标是推动2D AIGC技术的落地应用，进入千家万户的生活，让每一个人都能享受人工智能艺术创作

把“读博动机/长期目标”这段改成更具体、符合你给的意思，可以直接替换为下面这一版（英文，和你原文风格一致）：

```latex
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, including image and video generation with diffusion models. My long-term goal is to \textbf{translate 2D AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, everyday creative tools}---making high-quality AI-powered art creation available to \textbf{everyone}, not only experts. I hope to help bring these systems into daily life at scale, so that people from different backgrounds can easily express ideas, tell stories, and create visual content through reliable and controllable generative models. Through rigorous training and cross-institution collaboration in the NTU--SJTU Joint PhD setting, I aim to advance both the methodological foundations and the practical deployment of \textbf{diffusion-based image and video generation} under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, distribution shift, efficiency, safety, and interpretability.
```

如果你希望更“落地/产业化”一点，我也可以再给一个更强调产品化与社会影响的版本。

按照我说的中文部分翻译为英文，继续完善我的personal statement，注意不要修改英文部分：
  
My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. 当我第一次接触到Stable Diffusion这样的生成式AI模型创作的艺术作品时，我为其惊人的美丽和无限的创意所深深折服。

My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.  
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.  
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.  
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and seemingly boundless creativity. This experience made me realize that generative models are not only a technical breakthrough, but also a new medium for human expression. Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life so that people in thousands of households can benefit from it and everyone can enjoy creating art with the help of artificial intelligence.

My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
From my point of view, generative models are not only a technical breakthrough that 极大降低了艺术创作的门槛, but also a new medium for human 艺术 expression.

My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.  
From my point of view, generative models are not only a technical breakthrough that \textbf{significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation}, but also a new medium for human \textbf{artistic expression}.

My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
随着我使用生成式模型越来越多 我意识到, generative models are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.

My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity. As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.

My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. 这也是我希望攻读PhD的主要原因

\noindent
My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC.
  
第三段，简单展开一下我在这方面已经积累的科研经验

把第三段替换/扩写为下面这一段即可（保持与你前文一致的语气与长度，内容留了少量可替换占位符，方便你按实际情况补充）：

```latex
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC, truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC. In preparation for this goal, I have already accumulated research experience through coursework-driven and independent projects in generative modeling. Specifically, I have implemented and experimented with diffusion-based pipelines for image generation, conducted systematic ablation studies on key design choices (e.g., noise schedules, sampling strategies, and conditioning mechanisms), and built reproducible training and evaluation code to compare different model variants. I also actively follow recent literature on diffusion models and AIGC, and I have developed the habit of translating papers into working prototypes to validate ideas and identify practical bottlenecks. These experiences have strengthened my ability to formulate research questions, run reliable experiments, and iterate from empirical observations to improved methods, which I believe will help me contribute effectively in the NTU--SJTU Joint PhD programme.
```

如果你把你“已经做过的具体科研经历”发我（例如：项目名/方向、是否有论文投稿、用过的数据集、你负责的核心模块、最好结果），我可以把占位内容改成非常具体、可量化、对申请更加分的版本。
不，我的意思是在这基础上写一小段展开

Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC. In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by reading and reproducing representative works on diffusion models, implementing end-to-end training and inference pipelines, and conducting careful experiments to understand how design choices affect both generation quality and efficiency. Through these projects, I became familiar with the full research workflow---from surveying literature and formulating hypotheses to debugging large-scale training, running ablations, and summarizing results in a clear and reproducible manner---which prepares me to pursue more systematic and impactful research in the Joint PhD programme.

翻译为中文，不要修改英文部分：
  
In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by 参与多项前沿AIGC科研工作，并在国际顶尖学术会议上发表

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by \textbf{participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences}.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is 我在上海人工智能实验室的研究实习经历， where 我完全focus on generative diffusion models。

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is \textbf{my research internship at the Shanghai AI Laboratory}, where I \textbf{focused exclusively on generative diffusion models}.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models.  在这些项目中，我遇到了许多棘手的困难，例如高质量训练数据的稀缺和模型推理速度的迟缓

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these projects, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of diffusion models.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale diffusion models. 我通过潜心研究利用模型内在能力的training-free技术和缓存、稀疏计算等推理加速技术，成功解决了难题

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale diffusion models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of \textbf{training-free techniques} that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities, as well as \textbf{inference acceleration methods} such as caching and sparse computation, which allowed me to successfully overcome these challenges.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. 这些学术成果受到了学术界一定的认可，为AIGC的发展做出了贡献，这更坚定了我通过攻读PhD继续深造的决定

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and contributed, in my own way, to the progress of AIGC, which has further strengthened my determination to continue my training and pursue a PhD.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. 这些学术成果受到了学术界一定的认可，为AIGC的发展做出了贡献，这更坚定了我在该领域继续深造的决定

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. These academic outcomes have gained a certain level of recognition from the research community and contributed to the advancement of AIGC, which has further strengthened my decision to continue advanced study in this field.

My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC.
\\
\\
In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and contributed, in my own way, to the progress of AIGC, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area.
  
再起一段，开始讲why school/ shy programme，大体内容为：
  
NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. 它有许多享誉学术界的专研AIGC的实验室，例如NTU MMLab

NTU is well-known for its strong strengths in computer science and engineering, as well as artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC and generative modeling, such as \textbf{NTU MMLab}. I am particularly attracted to the \textbf{NTU--SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme} because it offers a unique opportunity to receive rigorous training and guidance from both institutions while benefiting from complementary research cultures and resources. I believe this joint environment will not only broaden my academic perspective, but also provide an ideal platform for me to pursue impactful research on diffusion-based image and video generation, bridging fundamental advances with real-world deployment.

Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC.
\\
\\
In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and contributed, in my own way, to the progress of AIGC, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area.
\\
\\
\noindent
NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, 在两校杰出的导师指导下

\noindent  
NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, \textbf{and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities}.

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. 通过我在SJTU的导师，我联系到了NTU的潘新钢教授，一位在2D AIGC领域的杰出学者

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with \textbf{Professor Xingang Pan} at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the area of 2D AIGC.

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN models and diffusion models, 这和我的研究兴趣相当契合

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atomosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN models and diffusion models, \textbf{which closely aligns with my research interests}.

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atmosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN models and diffusion models. During our meetings, we discussed topics such as high-resolution synthesis with diffusion models and light control for diffusion models, which closely aligns with my own research interests. 通过申请NTU-SJTU联合博士，我相信，一方面，潘教授能够为我未来的研究提供宝贵的指导，另一方面，我也可以为他在NTU的研究组做出有意义的贡献

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atmosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN models and diffusion models. During our meetings, we discussed topics such as high-resolution synthesis with diffusion models and light control for diffusion models, which closely aligns with my own research interests. By applying for the NTU--SJTU Joint PhD programme, I believe that, on the one hand, Prof. Pan can provide invaluable guidance for my future research; on the other hand, I will be able to make meaningful contributions to his research group at NTU.

My name is Jiazi Bu, and I am currently a first-year PhD student at School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). I received my Bachelor's degree in Artifical Intelligence, also from SJTU, and directly transitioned to the current PhD programme.
My research interest lies in generative models, especially 2D AIGC, e.g., image and video generation with diffusion models, and my long-term goal is to translate AIGC technologies from research prototypes into widely accessible, creative tools available for everyone.
I am applying for the \textbf{NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme}. Through my graduate studies, I aim to advance both the theoretical foundations and the practical deployment of diffusion models under real-world constraints such as data scarcity, efficiency, and interpretability.
\\
\\
\noindent
My interest in generative models began in my sophomore year. When I first encountered artworks created by generative AI models such as Stable Diffusion, I was deeply captivated by their striking beauty and boundless creativity.
As I used generative models more extensively, I gradually realized that they are not only a technical breakthrough that significantly lowers the barrier to artistic creation, but also a new medium for human expression.
Since then, I have been increasingly motivated by a concrete goal: to help make generative models, particularly 2D AIGC truly practical and widely adopted, bringing AI-assisted artistic creation into everyday life. Pursuing a PhD will allow me to explore unknown areas, develop new ideas, and collaborate with other researchers to help advance the field of 2D AIGC.
\\
\\
In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as acceleration methods such as caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and contributed, in my own way, to the progress of AIGC, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area.
\\
\\
\noindent
NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atmosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN and diffusion models. During our meetings, we discussed topics such as high-resolution synthesis with diffusion models and light control for diffusion models, which closely aligns with my own research interests. By applying for the NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Programme, I believe that, on the one hand, Prof. Pan can provide invaluable guidance for my future research; on the other hand, I can also make meaningful contributions to his research group at NTU.
  
再起一段，开始讲规划。从这句话开始，但是要换种说法，不要一样: I have a clear and well-defined vision for my future  and career

Looking ahead, I have developed a concrete plan for both my doctoral training and long-term career development. During the Joint PhD, I hope to focus on diffusion-based image and video generation with an emphasis on \textbf{practicality and deployability}, including improving generation quality under limited data, accelerating inference for real-time or interactive creation, and enhancing controllability and interpretability for reliable user-facing applications. I plan to work closely with researchers at both SJTU and NTU, regularly exchange ideas across the two environments, and aim to publish impactful results in top-tier venues while also building reproducible systems that can be transferred to real-world AIGC products. In the longer term, I aspire to continue as a researcher in either academia or industry R\&D, bridging fundamental advances in generative models with applications that enable everyone to create and enjoy AI-assisted art in everyday life.

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atmosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN and diffusion models. During our meetings, we discussed topics such as high-resolution synthesis with diffusion models and motion control for diffusion models, which closely aligns with my own research interests. 例如，潘教授在NeurIPS上发表的论文**Video Diffusion Models are Training-free Motion Interpreter and Controller与我在ICLR上发表的论文MotionClone: Training-Free Motion Cloning for Controllable Video Generation实现了相同功能，我们就此展开了许多交流**. By applying for the NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Programme, I believe that, on the one hand, Prof. Pan can provide invaluable guidance for my future research; on the other hand, I can also make meaningful contributions to his research group at NTU. I am certain that NTU can provide a flagship academic and research environment for us PhD students, and this joint PhD programme is the best choice for me.

NTU is well-known for its strong strength in computer science and engineering, and also artificial intelligence. It is home to several internationally recognized research groups that specialize in AIGC, such as the NTU MMLab. I am particularly attracted by the joint PhD programmes offered by NTU, since these programmes can provide us PhD students great chances to experience the different cultural and academic atmosphere of the two institutions, and to conduct research under the guidance of outstanding advisors from both universities. Through my advisor at SJTU, I had the opportunity to connect with Prof. Xingang Pan at NTU, an outstanding scholar in the field of generative models, especially GAN and diffusion models. During our meetings, we discussed topics such as high-resolution synthesis with diffusion models and motion control for diffusion models, which closely aligns with my own research interests. For example, Prof. Pan's NeurIPS paper \textbf{``Video Diffusion Models are Training-free Motion Interpreter and Controller''} and my ICLR paper \textbf{``MotionClone: Training-Free Motion Cloning for Controllable Video Generation''} explore highly related capabilities in training-free motion understanding and control for video diffusion models, and we had extensive discussions on their connections and potential future directions. By applying for the NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Programme, I believe that, on the one hand, Prof. Pan can provide invaluable guidance for my future research; on the other hand, I can also make meaningful contributions to his research group at NTU. I am certain that NTU can provide a flagship academic and research environment for us PhD students, and this joint PhD programme is the best choice for me.

Looking ahead, I have developed a concrete plan for both my doctoral training and long-term career development. With an undergraduate GPA of 4.04/4.3 (ranked 5/95) and multiple first-author publications at top academic conferences such as CVPR and NeurIPS, I am confident in my solid technical foundation and research capability for a PhD. During my PhD, I plan to conduct in-depth research on active topics in generative models, such as reinforcement learning and high-resolution generation. After producing impactful academic results, I hope to engage in broader collaborations with both academia and industry. Upon completing the PhD, I may pursue a postdoctoral position to work toward a faculty career, or directly take on a research-related role in the AIGC industry, \textbf{continuing to devote myself to advancing this field}.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects (e.g., motion control and light control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as model acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and 被顶尖的AI学术会议所接受, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects (e.g., motion control and light control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
My most important research experience is my research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as model acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have received encouraging recognition from the community and \textbf{have been accepted by top-tier AI conferences}, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area.
